title: Roasted Dense American Eggs Frittata
description: A keto-friendly, brunch-mood American dish featuring roasted vegetables and a crispy, cheesy crust. This frittata is made with Parmigiano-Reggiano and is perfect for a weekend breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onions and cook until they are lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced bell peppers and cook for another 5 minutes, until they are tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Add the shredded Parmigiano-Reggiano and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the vegetables in the skillet and cook until the edges start to set, about 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and broil for 2-3 minutes, until the top is golden brown and the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
Garnish with additional Parmigiano-Reggiano and fresh herbs, if desired.
